'''mavuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebularz|cebularz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebularz|cebularz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mavuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæviwith|mæviwith]] || [[word:mæviwij|mæviwij]] || [[word:mæviwish|mæviwish]] || [[word:mæviwi|mæviwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mavuvuwuth|mavuvuwuth]] || [[word:mavuvuwuj|mavuvuwuj]] || [[word:mavuvuwush|mavuvuwush]] || [[word:mavuvuwu|mavuvuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mavuwuth|mavuwuth]] || [[word:mavuwuj|mavuwuj]] || [[word:mavuwush|mavuwush]] || [[word:mavuwu|mavuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mavufwuth|mavufwuth]] || [[word:mavufwuj|mavufwuj]] || [[word:mavufwush|mavufwush]] || [[word:mavufwuf|mavufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mavuwuthu|mavuwuthu]] || [[word:mavuwuju|mavuwuju]] || [[word:mavuwushu|mavuwushu]] || [[word:mavuwuku|mavuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mavuwuth|mavuwuth]] || [[word:mavuwuj|mavuwuj]] || [[word:mavuwush|mavuwush]] || [[word:mavuwu|mavuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mavuwuthul|mavuwuthul]] || [[word:mavuwujul|mavuwujul]] || [[word:mavuwushul|mavuwushul]] || [[word:mavuwukul|mavuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mavuwuthuthu|mavuwuthuthu]] || [[word:mavuwujuju|mavuwujuju]] || [[word:mavuwushushu|mavuwushushu]] || [[word:mavuwuku|mavuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mavuwuthun|mavuwuthun]] || [[word:mavuwujun|mavuwujun]] || [[word:mavuwushun|mavuwushun]] || [[word:mavuwukun|mavuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mavuwuthuoro|mavuwuthuoro]] || [[word:mavuwujuoro|mavuwujuoro]] || [[word:mavuwushuoro|mavuwushuoro]] || [[word:mavuwukuoro|mavuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
